_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill to access the databases where plans/directives/guidance are maintained.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in advising on data processing agreements, standard contractual clauses, binding corporate rules, and other cross-border data transfer mechanisms, ensuring compliance with applicable jurisdictional requirements and supervisory guidance.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.601), OP-T-001 (OP, cosine: 0.588).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.404). Shared vocabulary: [guidance, skill]. DCWF-only terms [access, databases, directives, maintained, plans] vs WIDAI-only terms [advising, agreements, applicable, binding, border, clauses] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.860 (P=0.872, R=0.848). P exceeds R by 0.024 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 28 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Skill to access the databases where plans/directives/guidance are maintained." and "Skill in advising on data processing agreements, standard contractual clauses, b" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.608 > STS 0.404 (gap +0.203). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [guidance, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.6%. Shared tokens: [guidance, skill]. DCWF-only: [access, databases, directives, maintained, plans]. WIDAI-only: [advising, agreements, applicable, binding, border, clauses].
